abilities.description: Conjure a card of your choice from CARDNAME's spellbook into your hand. Activate only as a sorcery.

effect.description: Conjure a card of your choice from CARDNAME's spellbook into your hand. Activate only as a sorcery.
effect.name: MakeCard

triggers.description: At the beginning of your upkeep, instant and sorcery cards in your hand perpetually gain "This spell costs {1} less to cast."
